case_title: D`ANGELO, JENNIFER VS SAVE ON GLASS (ALLEN YAZDI ) OWNER

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAVE ON GLASS (ALLEN YAZDI ) OWNER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY D`ANGELO, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT SAVE ON GLASS (ALLEN YAZDI ) OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D`ANGELO, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAVE ON GLASS (ALLEN YAZDI ) OWNER PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
